MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-04-2021 - APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL VIA COURTCALL BY ANTHONY GILES, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT TARA BROWN; DAVID SHANE, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT LISA WONG; JAMIESON FONG, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT ULYSSES MAURILLE. THE COURT SET ORDERS TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. ANTHONY GILES, ATTY. DAVID SHANE, AND ATTY. JAMIESON FONG FOR JAN-15-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. COUNSEL MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, CONTINUED THE TRIAL TO MAY-05-2021, A DATE AGREEABLE BY ALL COUNSEL, AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206, AS PENDING MOTION FOR INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT AND APPOINTMENT OF A REFEREE IS CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR 01/11/21 IN DEPT. 501. COUNSEL MAY APPEAR VIA COURTCALL. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 OSC - TRIAL DEPARTMENT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2021 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested persons.

The Court calls the calendar. No appearance is made.

The Court notes that the matter is on calendar for OSC re: Dismissal issued, filed, and duly served on May 21, 2021. The Court notes that the Order to Show Cause provides that the Court is authorized to dismiss the action unless good cause is shown as to why the case should not be dismissed.

The Court notes that the May 21, 2021 Order further provides that should no counsel or party object to the dismissal of the case, no appearance is required at this hearing.

There being no appearance and no objection filed or otherwise delivered to the Court, the Court dismisses that action as to all parties and all causes of action pursuant to California Rule of Court 3.1385.
